title: MineKarts!
description: A Work in progress Texture pack that changes boats into go karts!
body:
MineKarts is a work-in-progress texture pack that transforms boats into go-karts.
Current karts include:

- Oak Boat → Red and Blue Kart
- 
- Spruce Boat → Purple and Yellow Kart
- 
- Dark Oak Boat → Mushroom-Themed Kart

All other boats currently default to the Red and Blue Kart.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
